snippet.title: Shaadi Masti l Sreehari K | Hanan Shaah | Official Music Video l Saina Music Indie
snippet.description:
A Saina Music Indie Original

Director : Nihal Hameed
Producer : Aashiq Bava
Music Composed & Produced by : Sreehari K
Lyrics : Sharfu
Vocals :  Hanan Shaah, Dhaliya Navas
Concept & DOP : SBK Shuhaib 
Editor :  Muhammed Shabeer 
Creative Director : Rajeesh Velayudhan 
Dance Choreographer : Amruth Ratna 
Executive Producer : Salman KM, Amal Aricken
Project Coordination : Bhadra Sandeep,  Suhas KS


Audio Credits 

Music Composed & Produced by : Sreehari K
Lyrics : Sharfu
Vocals :  Hanan Shaah, Dhaliya Navas
Guitars by Sandeep Mohan
Ethnic Percussion by Suresh Krishnan
Chorus by Shabarish, Shihad, Basil , Anjali P Sivakumar, Angelina Luka , Dhaliya Navas
Kazoo & Additional Background Vocals by Sreehari K
Mix and Mastered by Sai Prakash at My Studio Cochin
Studio : My Studio , Nhq , Skr Studios , Hotel California 
Recording Engineers : Akshay Kakkoth ,Omkaradas Om, Sreerag Suresh

Artists : Dilshana, Stini Francis
Line Producer : Yoonus Daxo
Art Director : Ansar Koppan
Costumers : Shaik Darwesh, Afeefa Puthige, Khayali Couture, Manly Costumes
Makeup : Althaf, Harsha Pathu, Shaiba SBK
Chief Associate Cameraman : Aromal MJ
VFX : Thoufeek 
Colorist : Bilal Rasheed 
Di studio - Hues & tones
Stills : Sameeh Ibn Usman 
Associate Director : Alan Joseph Siby
Associate Choreographers : Mahir Shamz, Alvina
Gaffer : KK Ameen
Associate Cameraman : Sarath Krishnan
Assistant Directors : Neha Mathew, Sarangu Baisil Sanal
Assistant Cameraman :Farhan Vadakkan
Associate Editors : Bharath Edat, Vishnu Adhvik
Team Costume Design: Fathima Dansha, Afri, Murad
Makeup Team : Fathima, Lalu, Lubna
Dance Team : AG Dance & Fitness Studio 
Designs : Vishnu Narayan, Krishnaprasad KV, Martin Shaji , Muhammed  Alfas , Shivada J , Sahin 
Spot Editor: Rahul Raghunath
Making Video : Sooraj KV


Location Partner : Staydium 
Event Partner : Fayiz - Be Weddings


Lyrics: 

മാണിക്യ കല്ലുകൾ പോലും
നാണിച്ച്‌ പോകണ ചേലിൽ
കല്ലിയാണ പെണ്ണൊരുങ്ങും നാളിത്‌...
പതിവിലേറെ പുതുമയോടെ
അതിഥിയായി വരുമൊരാൾ...

ചുരുൾമുടി ചുരുളിലു കുടമുല്ലയും
കസവുള്ള മുന്താണിയും
പരിമളം പരത്തുന്ന തളിർമേനിയും
കണ്ണഞ്ചും സുന്ദരി നീ സുന്ദരി....

ആഘോഷത്തിലു ആളുകൾ 
ചെത്തിലു ഒത്തൊരുമിച്ചേ
സൊറ പത്ത്‌ പറഞ്ഞ്‌ രസിച്ചേ
പല അത്തറു തേച്ച്‌ വിരാജിച്ചേ...

ഏനാന്തത്തിലു കുട്ടികൾ 
ചുറ്റിലും കുത്തി മറിഞ്ഞേ
നടു പന്തലിൽ ഓടി നടന്നേ
ചിലർ കോന്തല തൂങ്ങുന്നേ...

നാരീ പുതുനാരീ നാണംകൊണ്ട്‌ കുണുങ്ങീ
സാരീ കാഞ്ചീപുരം ഉടുത്തൊരുങ്ങീ
മാരൻ കാറിൽ വരുന്നതും
ഹാരം തരുന്നതും
ഓർത്ത്‌ കരളിലു കുളിരിറങ്ങീ..


മംഗല നാളിലു അംഗനമാരുടെ
അംഗുലിതുമ്പിലു ലങ്കിമറിയണു
അമ്മിമലിട്ട്‌ അരച്ച്‌ വരച്ചൊരു മൈലാഞ്ചി...

പന്തലു നടുവിലു ഒപ്പന ആടണ
നാൽപ്പതിൽ മിന്നണ സുന്ദരിമാരുടെ
കജ്ജിലും കാലിലും മൊഞ്ചിലു ലങ്കണു മൈലാഞ്ചി...

കാച്ചിഉടുത്തുംകൊണ്ട്‌ 
പാച്ചിലു പായുന്നുണ്ട്‌
കല്ലാച്ചിനിന്നും വന്ന വലിയമ്മായി

പച്ചനിറത്തിലുള്ള 
റൈബാനും വെച്ചുംകൊണ്ടു
കച്ചറ കുറ്റിച്ചിറ ചെറിയമ്മായി

ജന്നലിനോരം ജാലമെറിഞ്ഞ
പെൺമണിമാരുടെ കണ്ണിണകണ്ട്‌
കൺമുനകൊണ്ട്‌ ചൂണ്ടയെറിഞ്ഞ്‌
തിരിഞ്ഞ്‌ മറിഞ്ഞ്‌ നടന്ന് കളിക്കും
മൊഞ്ചൻമാർക്കൊരു മോഹം
ഈ സംഗതിതന്നെ പ്രേമം
ഇത്‌ അങ്ങനെ ഇങ്ങനെ
ഖൽബിൽ കനവിൻ 
മണിയറ പണിയണ
സരിഗമപധനിസ...

നാരീ പുതുനാരീ നാണംകൊണ്ട്‌ കുണുങ്ങീ
സാരീ കാഞ്ചീപുരം ഉടുത്തൊരുങ്ങീ
മാരൻ കാറിൽ വരുന്നതും
ഹാരം തരുന്നതും
ഓർത്ത്‌ കരളിലു കുളിരിറങ്ങീ..

ദമ്മിലു വേവും നേരം
ആവി പറപറക്കും
കോഴി ബിരിയാണീടെ
മണംപിടിച്ച്‌,

കാലൻ കുടപിടിച്ച്‌ 
കാലുമ്മേൽ കാലുംവെച്ച്‌
കോലായിൽ കുത്തീരിക്കും
വല്ലിപ്പാമാരു

ജന്നലിനോരം ജാലമെറിഞ്ഞ
പെൺമണിമാരുടെ കണ്ണിണകണ്ട്‌
കൺമുനകൊണ്ട്‌ ചൂണ്ടയെറിഞ്ഞ്‌
തിരിഞ്ഞ്‌ മറിഞ്ഞ്‌ നടന്ന് കളിക്കും
മൊഞ്ചൻമാർക്കൊരു മോഹം
ഈ സംഗതിതന്നെ പ്രേമം
ഇത്‌ അങ്ങനെ ഇങ്ങനെ
ഖൽബിൽ കനവിൻ 
മണിയറ പണിയണ
സരിഗമപധനിസ...

മംഗല നാളിലു അംഗനമാരുടെ
അംഗുലിതുമ്പിലു ലങ്കിമറിയണു
അമ്മിമലിട്ട്‌ അരച്ച്‌ വരച്ചൊരു മൈലാഞ്ചി

പന്തലു നടുവിലു ഒപ്പന ആടണ
നാൽപ്പതിൽ മിന്നണ സുന്ദരിമാരുടെ
കജ്ജിലും കാലിലും മൊഞ്ചിലു ലങ്കണു മൈലാഞ്ചി

ആഘോഷത്തിലു ആളുകൾ 
ചെത്തിലു ഒത്തൊരുമിച്ചേ
സൊറ പത്ത്‌ പറഞ്ഞ്‌ രസിച്ചേ
പല അത്തറു തേച്ച്‌ വിരാജിച്ചേ...

ഏനാന്തത്തിലു കുട്ടികൾ 
ചുറ്റിലും കുത്തി മറിഞ്ഞേ
നടു പന്തലിൽ ഓടി നടന്നേ
ചിലർ കോന്തല തൂങ്ങുന്നേ...

en.title: Shaadi Masti l Sreehari K | Hanan Shaah | Official Music Video l Saina Music Indie
en.description:
A Saina Music Indie Original

Director : Nihal Hameed
Producer : Aashiq Bava
Music Composed & Produced by : Sreehari K
Lyrics : Sharfu
Vocals :  Hanan Shaah, Dhaliya Navas
Concept & DOP : SBK Shuhaib 
Editor :  Muhammed Shabeer 
Creative Director : Rajeesh Velayudhan 
Dance Choreographer : Amruth Ratna 
Executive Producer : Salman KM, Amal Aricken
Project Coordination : Bhadra Sandeep,  Suhas KS


Audio Credits 

Music Composed & Produced by : Sreehari K
Lyrics : Sharfu
Vocals :  Hanan Shaah, Dhaliya Navas
Guitars by Sandeep Mohan
Ethnic Percussion by Suresh Krishnan
Chorus by Shabarish, Shihad, Basil , Anjali P Sivakumar, Angelina Luka , Dhaliya Navas
Kazoo & Additional Background Vocals by Sreehari K
Mix and Mastered by Sai Prakash at My Studio Cochin
Studio : My Studio , Nhq , Skr Studios , Hotel California 
Recording Engineers : Akshay Kakkoth ,Omkaradas Om, Sreerag Suresh

Artists : Dilshana, Stini Francis
Line Producer : Yoonus Daxo
Art Director : Ansar Koppan
Costumers : Shaik Darwesh, Afeefa Puthige, Khayali Couture, Manly Costumes
Makeup : Althaf, Harsha Pathu, Shaiba SBK
Chief Associate Cameraman : Aromal MJ
VFX : Thoufeek 
Colorist : Bilal Rasheed 
Di studio - Hues & tones
Stills : Sameeh Ibn Usman 
Associate Director : Alan Joseph Siby
Associate Choreographers : Mahir Shamz, Alvina
Gaffer : KK Ameen
Associate Cameraman : Sarath Krishnan
Assistant Directors : Neha Mathew, Sarangu Baisil Sanal
Assistant Cameraman :Farhan Vadakkan
Associate Editors : Bharath Edat, Vishnu Adhvik
Team Costume Design: Fathima Dansha, Afri, Murad
Makeup Team : Fathima, Lalu, Lubna
Dance Team : AG Dance & Fitness Studio 
Designs : Vishnu Narayan, Krishnaprasad KV, Martin Shaji , Muhammed  Alfas , Shivada J , Sahin 
Spot Editor: Rahul Raghunath
Making Video : Sooraj KV


Location Partner : Staydium 
Event Partner : Fayiz - Be Weddings


Lyrics: 

മാണിക്യ കല്ലുകൾ പോലും
നാണിച്ച്‌ പോകണ ചേലിൽ
കല്ലിയാണ പെണ്ണൊരുങ്ങും നാളിത്‌...
പതിവിലേറെ പുതുമയോടെ
അതിഥിയായി വരുമൊരാൾ...

ചുരുൾമുടി ചുരുളിലു കുടമുല്ലയും
കസവുള്ള മുന്താണിയും
പരിമളം പരത്തുന്ന തളിർമേനിയും
കണ്ണഞ്ചും സുന്ദരി നീ സുന്ദരി....

ആഘോഷത്തിലു ആളുകൾ 
ചെത്തിലു ഒത്തൊരുമിച്ചേ
സൊറ പത്ത്‌ പറഞ്ഞ്‌ രസിച്ചേ
പല അത്തറു തേച്ച്‌ വിരാജിച്ചേ...

ഏനാന്തത്തിലു കുട്ടികൾ 
ചുറ്റിലും കുത്തി മറിഞ്ഞേ
നടു പന്തലിൽ ഓടി നടന്നേ
ചിലർ കോന്തല തൂങ്ങുന്നേ...

നാരീ പുതുനാരീ നാണംകൊണ്ട്‌ കുണുങ്ങീ
സാരീ കാഞ്ചീപുരം ഉടുത്തൊരുങ്ങീ
മാരൻ കാറിൽ വരുന്നതും
ഹാരം തരുന്നതും
ഓർത്ത്‌ കരളിലു കുളിരിറങ്ങീ..


മംഗല നാളിലു അംഗനമാരുടെ
അംഗുലിതുമ്പിലു ലങ്കിമറിയണു
അമ്മിമലിട്ട്‌ അരച്ച്‌ വരച്ചൊരു മൈലാഞ്ചി...

പന്തലു നടുവിലു ഒപ്പന ആടണ
നാൽപ്പതിൽ മിന്നണ സുന്ദരിമാരുടെ
കജ്ജിലും കാലിലും മൊഞ്ചിലു ലങ്കണു മൈലാഞ്ചി...

കാച്ചിഉടുത്തുംകൊണ്ട്‌ 
പാച്ചിലു പായുന്നുണ്ട്‌
കല്ലാച്ചിനിന്നും വന്ന വലിയമ്മായി

പച്ചനിറത്തിലുള്ള 
റൈബാനും വെച്ചുംകൊണ്ടു
കച്ചറ കുറ്റിച്ചിറ ചെറിയമ്മായി

ജന്നലിനോരം ജാലമെറിഞ്ഞ
പെൺമണിമാരുടെ കണ്ണിണകണ്ട്‌
കൺമുനകൊണ്ട്‌ ചൂണ്ടയെറിഞ്ഞ്‌
തിരിഞ്ഞ്‌ മറിഞ്ഞ്‌ നടന്ന് കളിക്കും
മൊഞ്ചൻമാർക്കൊരു മോഹം
ഈ സംഗതിതന്നെ പ്രേമം
ഇത്‌ അങ്ങനെ ഇങ്ങനെ
ഖൽബിൽ കനവിൻ 
മണിയറ പണിയണ
സരിഗമപധനിസ...

നാരീ പുതുനാരീ നാണംകൊണ്ട്‌ കുണുങ്ങീ
സാരീ കാഞ്ചീപുരം ഉടുത്തൊരുങ്ങീ
മാരൻ കാറിൽ വരുന്നതും

ഓർത്ത്‌ കരളിലു കുളിരിറങ്ങീ..

ദമ്മിലു വേവും നേരം
ആവി പറപറക്കും
കോഴി ബിരിയാണീടെ
മണംപിടിച്ച്‌,

കാലൻ കുടപിടിച്ച്‌ 
കാലുമ്മേൽ കാലുംവെച്ച്‌
കോലായിൽ കുത്തീരിക്കും
വല്ലിപ്പാമാരു

ജന്നലിനോരം ജാലമെറിഞ്ഞ

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ke Chadar Odhe |HeartTouching Sad Song |Emotional LoveStory |Hindi Sad Song 2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe
Singer- Shobi Sarwan 


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Gandhi Talks Trailer | Vijay S | Arvind S | Aditi Rao | A.R.Rahman | Siddharth J |  Releasing 30 Jan
snippet.description:
Not every story needs words.
Some are meant to be felt.

This time, the screen doesn't talk. It makes you listen.

Gandhi Talks, releasing in cinemas worldwide on the 30th of January.

Cast - Vijay Sethupathi, Arvind Swami, Aditi Rao Hydari, Siddharth Jadhav

An A.R. Rahman Musical 

Writer & Director - Kishor Pandurang ‘Belekar’
Producers: Rajesh Kejriwal, Gurpal Sachar

snippet.title: O'Romeo: Aashiqon Ki Colony | Shahid K, Disha P | Sajid N | Vishal B | Gulzar | Madhubanti | Javed A
snippet.description:
Presenting the Second Song "Aashiqon Ki Colony" from the Upcoming Film "O'Romeo'. Starring Shahid Kapoor, Triptii Dimri, Avinash Tiwary, Farida Jalal, Vikrant Massey (Special Appearance), Nana Patekar, Tamannaah Bhatia, Disha Patani, Aruna Irani, Hussain Dalal & Rahul Deshpande.

Sajid Nadiadwala Presents
A Vishal Bhardwaj Film

"O'Romeo"

Produced By Sajid Nadiadwala 
Directed By Vishal Bhardwaj 
Story: Hussain Zaidi
Screenplay By: Vishal Bhardwaj & Rohan Narula
Dialogues by : Vishal Bhardwaj
Director Of Photography: Ben Bernhard, BVK
Choreographer: Jani Master
Creative Producer: Priti Shahani
Associate Producer: Manuj Mittra
Music on T-Series

O’Romeo Releases in Cinemas on 13th Feb 2026.

Composer: Vishal Bhardwaj
Lyrics: Gulzar
Singers: Madhubanti Bagchi, Javed Ali.
Music Arranger & Producer: Meghdeep Bose

Backing Vocalists:: Rajiv Sundaresan, Rishikesh Karmerkar, Suhas Sawant, Arun Kamath, Surabhi Khekale, Shushmita Narayan, Vasudha Tiwari, Pashmina Pawa, Apurva Nisshad, Shivika Rajesh, Archana Gore, Deepti Rege,

Mohammed Shadab

Song Recording- Salman Khan Afridi at Satya Studios, Mumbai
Rhythms recorded by Vijay Dayal asst. by Sagar Sathe at YRF Studios, Mumbai
Meghdeep Bose at Sound Bakery, Mumbai
Mixing: Prasad Maha
Mastering: Christian Wright at Abbey Road Studios, London

snippet.title: TOXIC (2026) - Trailer | Rocking Star Yash | Tara Sutaria | Geetu Mohandas | Fan Made AI
snippet.description:
TOXIC (2026) - Trailer | Rocking Star Yash | Tara Sutaria | Geetu Mohandas | Fan Made AI

This fan made AI trailer imagines Rocking Star Yash and Tara Sutaria meeting at a silent cemetery under a stormy sky. Surrounded by tombstones and shadows of the past, both characters arrive armed with guns, ready for a face-to-face moment that decides everything. The cemetery setting adds mystery, tension, and emotional weight to their moment, where silence speaks louder than bullets.

snippet.title: Vadh 2 - Official Trailer | Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta | Jaspal Singh Sandhu | Luv Films | 6th Feb
snippet.description:
An old prison guard- Shambhunath Mishra (Sanjay Mishra) and a jail inmate- Manju Singh (Neena Gupta) share a bond forged behind prison walls. 

When their ordinary lives are pulled into a moral conflict and truth refuses to surface, they stand at the centre of a choice that has consequences.

#Vadh2 #SanjayMishra #NeenaGupta

A Luv Films presentation, Vadh 2 is written and directed by Jaspal Singh Sandhu and produced by Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg. The film is slated for a theatrical release on 6th February 2026.

Starring: Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta with Kumud Mishra, Amitt K. Singh, Akshay Dogra, Shilpa Shukla & Yogita Bihani
Written & Directed By: Jaspal Singh Sandhu
Produced By: Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg

snippet.title: Berlin and the Lady with an Ermine | Official Teaser | Netflix
snippet.description:
'Berlín and the Lady with an Ermine' will premiere on Netflix on May 15, 2026.
In this new chapter of the series set in the universe of ' Money Heist', Berlin returns stronger than ever. And this time, Seville is the canvas.

A new masterstroke takes shape: the theft of a Da Vinci. Beauty, danger, and pure criminal elegance.
The gang reunites for a one-of-a-kind mission.

Created by Álex Pina and Esther Martínez Lobato, the creators of 'Money Heist', and starring Pedro Alonso (Berlin), Michelle Jenner (Keila), Tristán Ulloa (Damián), Begoña Vargas (Cameron), Julio Peña Fernández (Roi) and Joel Sánchez (Bruce). This season, Inma Cuesta joins the gang.
Release Date for 'Berlín and the Lady with an Ermine': May 15, 2026.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81759581

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Berlin and the Lady with an Ermine | Official Teaser | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Targeting a priceless work of art, Berlin assembles his gang of thieves in Seville in this explosive new installment from the creators of "Money Heist."

Lyrics -
सुबह का टाईम रहेगा बुढ़वा लेट से स्कूल जायेगा रूम के बाहर जाकर सोचेगा 
बुढ़वा - का याद कईले रहनी ऊं ऽऽऽ हां मैं आई कमीना सर जी 
 सभी लड़के हंसने लगेंगे

 मास्टर - चलो जल्दी अन्दर आओ 
 बुढ़वा - ठिक ह सरजी
 मास्टर - अच्छा  कखगघ किनको किनको याद है 
 सभी लोग हाथ उठायेंगे बुढ़वा भी हाथ उठायेगा 
 लड़की - सरजी हाई बुढ़वा को देखिए पिछली ABCD सुनाकर जीत गया तो सोच रहा है फिर जीत जायेगा 
 बुढ़वा - हे करेजा अगर हम जीत गईनी तब 
  लड़की - अरे जा जा इस उमर नाती पोता खेलाना चाहिए तो पढ़ने चला है 
 मास्टर - शान्त रहो सभी लोग चलो बेटी आ की मात्रा से शुरू करो 
 लड़की - ok सरजी 
 लड़की - अ से अनार होता है अनार से शरीर में खून बनता है 


 बुढ़वा - अ से अजगर होला इ एगो बहुत बड़ियार किरा होला जवन जंगल में पावल जाला अऊरू अ से अदरको होला जवन हमेशा खांसी में काम आवेला 
 लड़की - आ से आम होता हैं जो फलों का राजा कहलाता है 
 बुढ़वा - हां त आ से आलू होला है जो शरीर में रोग से लड़े वाला क्षमता के बढ़ावेला आऊर आ से आगियो होला जवने से घरे में खनवो बनेला 
 लड़की - छोटी इ से  इमली होती है और इमली  का सेवन हमें लू से भी बचाती है 
 बुढ़वा - हां तो छोटी इ से इडली होला इ एगो साऊथ इंडियन खाना ह आऊर छोटी इ से इमरती होला इ एगो निक खुनी चुटुक मुटुक मिठाई होले 
लड़की - बुढ़वा रे बड़ी ई से ईख होता है जिससे गुड़ और चीनी बनता है 
 बुढ़वा - हां त बड़की ई से ईश्वर यानि भगवान होन जिनकर हम रोज पूजा करीला अऊरू बड़की ई से ईट होला वने से हमर घरवा बनल ह 
  अरे तनी सुर में सुनावा 
 लड़की - त ले सुन 
                     गाना मुखड़ा 
 लड़की - अरे छोटका उ से होता है उल्लू दिखे ना जिसको   रात में 
 फिर मैं तुझे हराऊंगीं बुड्ढे आ जायेगा औकात में 
  बुढ़वा -अच्छा 
  अरे छोटका उ से  उपवन होला दूसरा नाम ह बाग रे 
  उ से होला उपहार जेके सब गिफ्ट कहेला आज रे 
                      दूसरा भाग 
 बुढ़वा - अब आगे बोल 
लड़की - बड़का ऊ से ऊन होता है और ऊन स स्वेटर बुना जाता है 
बुढ़वा - हां त ओही बड़का ऊ से ऊटवो होला जेके रेगिस्तान क जहाज कहल जाला  अऊरू बड़का ऊ से ऊष्मा भी होला जेके गर्मियों कहल जाला 
 लड़की - अरे बुढ़वा रे ऋ से ऋषि होता है जो वन में तपस्या करते हैं 
 बुढ़वा - हां त  ऋ से ऋतुओ होला जेके हम तू मौसम कहिला अऊरू ऋ से ऋण भी होला ेके कर्जों कहल जाला 
 लड़की - अरे बुढ़वा रे आगे सुन ए से एड़ी होता है यह मनुष्य के किसी एक अंग का नाम होता है 
बुढ़वा - हां त  ए से एकतारा होला जवने के मीरा माई बजावेनी  और ए से एको होला जवने के हम गिनतीयों पढ़ेनी

बुढ़वा - हां त  ए से एकतारा होला जवने के मीरा माई बजावेनी  और ए से एको होला जवने के हम गिनतीयों पढ़ेनी 

लड़की - अरे बुड्ढे ऐ से ऐनक होता जिसे चश्मा भी कहते हैं जो आंखों पर लगाया जाता है 
बुढ़वा - हां त ऐ से ऐरावत हाथी होला आऊर ऐ से ऐंठन भी होला जवन तोहरे अन्दर ह आऊर आज तोहार अईठन हम छोड़ा के रहब 
 लड़की - स्टूपिड बुड्ढे ये क्या बोल रहा है 
  बुढ़वा- अरे हम सही कहत हई 
                          अन्तरा 
 लड़की - ओ से होला ओखरी जेहमे कुटल जाला धान रे 
 आज पता चली तूं केतना हऊवे बुद्धि मान रे 
 बुढ़वा - ओ से होला ओझा जवन झारेला सबकर भूत रे 
 ओ से होला ओम जेके सब भजे सुबहिएं उठ रे
 
लड़की - झूठे कुद रहा है तेरे जोर नहीं आंत में 
 फिर मैं तुझे हराऊंगीं बुड्ढे आ जायेगा औकात में 
                        तीसरा अन्तरा 
 बुढ़वा - उ त आज पतै चल जाई 
 लड़की - अरे बुड्ढे औ से औरत होती है जो घरों का श्रृंगार होती है 
बुढ़वा - हां त औ से औलाद होला जेके सब बेटियो बेटा कहेला आऊर औ से औषधि यानि 
  दवाईयों होला जवने के सब हमेशा रोग वियाद में खाला 
लड़की - अं से अंगूर होता है जो एक प्रकार का मीठा और रसदार फल होता है 
 बुढ़वा - हां त अं से अंग भी होला जवन सबके पास ह और अं से अंडा भी होला जवने क हम रोज अमलेट खाईला 
 लड़की - अः से प्रातः होता है प्रातः सुबह को कहते हैं 
 बूढ़वा - हां त अः से अहम होला यानी कि घमंड जवन ए समय तोहरे पास ह आऊर नमः से नमस्कारो  होला जवन तू आज हमके करबू 
 लड़की - हं नमस्कार करी हमर जूती 
 बुढ़वा - अच्छा 
  लड़की -  सरजी हार गयल हाई बुढ़वा मुहवां भईल चोखा हो 
 हई आन्ही हम इ खाली हवे हवा क झोंका हो 
बुढ़वा - पिछलो बार त जीत ना पईलू गईलू हमसे हार हो 
 एदो पारी इज्जत आपन रखिला सम्हार हो 
 लड़की - करिहें सरजी खुदे फैएसला सुन बुढ़वा मोर बात रे 
 फिर तोहें बाबा क ठुल्लू मिली आ जईबा आपन औकात में 

#KamineAAaSuna #SonuRajbhar #Archna Rai #BhojpuriComedy #NewBhojpuriSong #WaveMusic #Comedy2026 #BhojpuriFunny

snippet.title: Yamraj (Official Video) Masoom Sharma | Kirti Kumar Satta | Rahul Muana | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
#yamraj  #masoomsharma #newharyanvisong #masoomsharmanewsong  #haryanvisongs #newharyanvisong2026

Yamraj - Masoom Sharma New Song | Kirti Kumar Satta | Rahul Muana | New Haryanvi Song 2026

Yamraaj - Masoom Sharma New Song | Kirti Kumar Satta | Rahul Muana | New Haryanvi Song 2026

#newharyanvisong #yamraj #masoomsharmanewsong #2026 #2026song #masoomsharma 

Masoom Sharma is back with a brand-new Haryanvi hit – Yamraj , featuring Kirti Kumar Satta and Rahul Muana. This energetic track blends desi swag with pure folk essence, composed by Masoom Sharma and directed by Chirag Bansal. With rustic lyrics by Kirti Kumar Satta & Rahul Muana , the song paints the picture of a desi lover’s pride and playful attitude

je paake gernal dyer tu to yaar bhi tatya tope hai , mere mangal pande se thought mout teri ruke na rooke te , jab bal thakre saab ki ju hum rancheter me dhaadege , ban maharana pratap taine balon khan ju paadege , re chander sekher jise azad gaat me bismil sa folaad lga de kon mard k hath re sir pe tharke thook dega , chahe yamraj khdya ho aage chora chaati me ja laage are na peet dikha k bhaage , yo 100ya ne rook dega. 
 
udham singh ju rhya hosla khudi ram sa josh bharya , are naar singh ju baire ki chaati pe ja k pair dhrya , one man army raakhe se hum netaji subhash jisi , or muh te vaani bole se hum sant guru ravi dass jisi , are hum bhagat singh se nidar , chore indira barge leader khurki deke soche gidad jungle sher chod dega,   chahe yamraj khdya ho aage chora chaati me ja laage are na peet dikha k bhaage , yo 100ya ne rook dega. 

vishavguru ki mili upaadhi dharti hai ya veera ki sone ki chidiya khde se jo khaan rhi se hira ki , kai baar khun te sichi dharti bharat maa k jaaya ne , jabe to satta naman kre un maaya ne , rahul muana likhe vo jo jag hote dikhe jo un veera te sikhe time pe jaan jhok dega, chahe yamraj khdya ho aage chora chaati me ja laage are na peet dikha k bhaage , yo 100ya ne rook dega.  
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Yamraj

snippet.title: Vaammo Vaayyo - Video | Bhartha Mahasayulaku Wignyapthi|Ravi Teja,Ashika R,Dimple H|Bheems Ceciroleo
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Telugu

Presenting the video song of "Vaammo Vaayyo" from 'Bhartha Mahasayulaku Wignyapthi' starring Ravi Teja, Ashika Ranganath, Dimple Hayathi and others. Directed by Kishore Tirumala. Music Composed by Bheems Ceciroleo. 

Song Credits:
Song Name: Vammo Vayyo
Lyrics: Dev Pawer
Singers: Swathi Reddy UK
Music Director: Bheems Ceciroleo

Musicians Credits:
Composed & Arranged By: Bheems Ceciroleo
Keyboards & Rhythms: Kalyan Keys
Female Backing Vocals: Sindhuja Srinivasan
Live Rhythms: Chiranjeevi, Anil Robin
Guitars & Frets: SM Subhani
Nadhaswaram: Mallikarjun
Recording Studio: A Bheems Musicals, Hyderabad
Recording Engineer: Mastan Vali
Vocals Melodyne & Song Pre-Mix: Mastan Vali
Mixed & Mastered By: Kishore Kumar Sathala
Music Production Manager: Malya Kandukuri
Studio Assistants: Sankaram, Rajesh

Movie Credits:
Writer–Director: Kishore Tirumala
Producer: Sudhakar Cherukuri
Music Director: Bheems Ceciroleo
DOP: Prasad Murella
Editor: A. Sreekar Prasad
Production Designer: A. S. Prakash
CEO: Vijay Kumar Chaganti
Makeup Chief: I. Srinivas Raju
Co-Director: Raam Ravipati
Executive Producer: Sekhar Yalamanchili
Banner: SLV Cinemas
Music: Saregama
PRO: Vamshi Shekar
Choreographer: Sekhar V. J
Marketing: First Show
Publicity Designs: Ananth Kancherla (Padma Sri Ads)
Lyrical Composition: Walls & Trends

Lyrics:
Pallavi :
Illu Paye, Ollu Paye – Kallu Paye, Pallu Paye
Puvvu Paye, Navvu Paye – Nuvvu Paye, Nenu Paye
Sellu Paye, Simmu Paye – Dappu Paye, Cheppu Paye
Dammu Paye, Dammu Paye – Sigge Gallani Paaye
Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddu Sollenkalo
Are Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddu Sollenkalo
Illu Paye, Ollu Paye Oo Rama Rama – Ga Lachugani Echulu
Paye Oo Rama Rama
Sellu Paye, Simmu Paye Oo Rama Rama – Ga Alla Soorigani
Sollupaye Oo Rama Rama
Puvvu Paye, Navvu Paye Oo Rama Rama – Gee Pottidani
Lavvupaye Oo Rama Rama
Muddhu Muchatanta Paye, Moothipallu Ralipaaye
Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddu Sollenkalo
Are Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddhu Sollenkalo

Charanam 1 :
Gettu Paye, Gattu Paye Oo Rama Rama – Nethimeeda Juttu
Oo Rama Rama
Senu Paye, Silaka Paye Oo Rama Rama – Sethilona Palaka
Paye Oo Rama Rama
Mannu Paaye, Malakapaaye Oo Rama Rama – Sunakulochi
Egiripaaye Oo Rama Rama
Giraka Paaye, Gilakapaaye – Nulakamancham Irigipaaye
Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddu Sollenkalo
Are Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddu Sollenkalo

Charanam 2 :
Langa Paaye, Oonipaaye Oo Rama Rama – Kanchipattu
Seerapaaye Oo Rama Rama
Adugupaye, Godugu Paye Oo Rama Rama – Unnadhanta
Oodsukupaaye Oo Rama Rama
Odlupaaye, Edlupaaye – Kongukunna Dhudlu Paaye
Oo Rama Rama
Bandlu Paaye Gundlu Paaye – Thupakilo Gundlu Paaye
Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddu Sollenkalo
Are Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddu Sollenkalo
Vammo.. Addededdedde – Vayyo
Vammo Vayyo Olenkalo, Nenem Cheddu Sollenkalo

snippet.title: Karathey Babu Teaser | Ravi Mohan | Daudee Jiwal | Ganesh K Babu | Sam CS | Screen Scene Media
snippet.description:
Presenting the official teaser of Karathey Babu, starring Ravi Mohan and directed by Ganesh K Babu. Produced by Screen Scene Media Entertainment, with music composed by Sam CS. An exciting glimpse into power, politics, and conflict.

Banner: Screen Scene Media Entertainment Pvt Ltd
Produced By : Sundar Arumugam 
Executive Producer: K S Senthil Kumar 
Head Of Distribution: S Kiran Kumar

snippet.title: Jo Ishq Hua | King & Aditya Dev | Shriya Pilgaonkar | Raja Hindustani | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
“Jo Ishq Hua” is King at his most heartfelt, a warm, tender ode to love. Built on intimate songwriting and a luminous melody, the track produced and co-composed by Aditya Dev, follows the emotional arc of falling deeply, fearlessly, and completely in love. “Jo Ishq Hua” is a declaration of timeless love, a celebration of the kind of connection that shapes you, steadies you, and makes you believe in the magic of finding your person.

STREAM NOW: https://out-now.lnk.to/JoIshqHua

Song Name: Jo Ishq Hua
Artist: King, Aditya Dev
Lyrics: King
Music Producer: Aditya Dev
Composed by: King, Aditya Dev
Recording Engineer: Samir Dharap at Input One
Female Vocals: Prateeksha Srivastava
Shehnai Player: Yogesh More
Mixed & Mastered by: Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika
A&R: Rajrishi Murthi

Video Credits:
Directed by: Akhilesh Vats
Concept by: Akhilesh Vats, Phalak Arora
Director of Photography: Manish Shunty
Focus Puller: Mahesh Sawaria
2nd Unit Director: Manan Gauri 
1st AC: Abdul Razak Shaikh
1st AD: Fanush Saini
2nd AD: Devika Satra
3rd AD: Prashant Raika and Raj Bhushan
Editor: Shuchi Gupta
Colorist: Sriprasad Sahoo
Assistant Colorist: Pratham Chhatoi

Line Production Company: Tash Films Creations
Line Producer: Aadesh Gola and Love K Lavania
Unit Production Manager: Prashant Rohilla and Jayant Sharma
Production Controller: Ashish Moudgil and Akash Rajput
Production Assistant: Junaid
Rajasthan Location Manager: Ayush Modi (AM FILMS)
Casting Director: Ajay Rawat and Pranjali Khera (D CAST TRACK) 
Gaffer: Ravi Baliyan
Key Grip: Pechimuthu Arumugan (Flamingo Films)
Jib Operator: Manish Kumar
DMX Operator: Amit Kumar
Light: Flamingo Films
Camera: Java Motion Pictures
Facility team: Shadab and Team

Production Designer: Snehi Mehul Shah
Art Director: Bajranj Ramdular Yadav 

Feature Makeup Artist: Pallavi Kapoor and Team

Feature Costume Stylist: Bati Handa
Assistant Costume Stylist: Risha Agarwal, Shruti Kansal, Anshu Yadav

Production House: Bluprint Inc.
Executive Producer: Bhavya Anand & Sweta Ojha

For King
Hair: Javed Sheikh
Make-up: Swapnil Haldankar 
King’s Styling: Suprit Parulkar
Styling Assistant: Shrutika Kulkarni, Maanya Saigal

King’s Wardrobe Partner: Manyavar
Kurta & Jacket Set: Rohit Kamra
Haldi Outfit: Manyavar
Shirt & Brown Trousers: Bombay Shirt Company
Mojaris: Jaypore
Wedding Sherwani: Manyavar
Eyewear: The Tribe
Jewellery: Taiyo Jewels
Shoes: Monkstory

Lead: Shriya Pilgaonkar
Management: Collective Artists Network 
HMU: Misheeta Sanghvi 
Styling: Himanshi Nijhawan
Co-Stylist: Avani Pratap
Manager: Anand Menon

Wardrobe Courtesy: Dolly J, The World of Anand Sharma
Jewellery Courtesy: Raabta by Rahul, Shilpa, Meraki
 
BTS: Rudransh Sharma & Adeeb Raza

Follow King:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/5NHm4TU5Twz7owibYxJfFU
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/il/artist/king/1489995981
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ifeelking 
Twitter : https://twitter.com/ifeelkingOG 
Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/ifeelkingxo 
  
Follow Warner Music India :   
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/warnermusicindia
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/WarnerMusicInd  
Twitter : https://twitter.com/warnermusicin

Lyrics: 

Verse 1

Ek aisi duniya jaha tu mere saath ho
Hum chaahein bolein na par dil se dil ki baat ho
Aur kabhi tole na dil ko cheezon se jaaneman

Ek aisa rasta kisi ko na pata chale
Jaha se guzrun toh tera naksha mile
Aur thak ke gir padhu aake teri hi kaandhon par

Chorus

Jo ishq hua so hua
Jo ishq hua so hua

Ab na jaanu teri hai dua
Ke na jaanu meri hai dua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua

Verse 2

Jo na tumhe chaahenge
Kya fir karke jaayenge
Hum jaise banne chale the
Hum shayad bann na paayenge

Tum itni zaroori ho
Saanson mein basi poori ho
Meri laage na nazariya tujhe
Inn aankho ki majburi ho

Chorus

Jo ishq hua so hua
Haan ishq hua so hua

Ab na jaanu teri hai dua
Ke na jaanu meri hai dua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua

Verse 3

Ek jhalak mein hi tera deewana hua
Ye duniya paagal bulaati hai

Ab sau nazar kya hi dekhun tumhe jaan-e-jaan
Aashiq ko ek bhi kaafi hai

Tum itni toh noori ho
Na samjho kahi pe adhuri ho
Khud se pyaar kiya karo
Kisi ke liye zaruri ho

Chorus

Jo ishq hua so hua
Haan ishq hua so hua

Ab na jaanu teri hai dua
Ke na jaanu meri hai dua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua

Ab jo ishq hua
Ab jo ishq hua

en-US.title: Jo Ishq Hua | King & Aditya Dev | Shriya Pilgaonkar | Raja Hindustani | Official Music Video
en-US.description:
“Jo Ishq Hua” is King at his most heartfelt, a warm, tender ode to love. Built on intimate songwriting and a luminous melody, the track produced and co-composed by Aditya Dev, follows the emotional arc of falling deeply, fearlessly, and completely in love. “Jo Ishq Hua” is a declaration of timeless love, a celebration of the kind of connection that shapes you, steadies you, and makes you believe in the magic of finding your person.

STREAM NOW: https://out-now.lnk.to/JoIshqHua

Song Name: Jo Ishq Hua
Artist: King, Aditya Dev
Lyrics: King
Music Producer: Aditya Dev
Composed by: King, Aditya Dev
Recording Engineer: Samir Dharap at Input One
Female Vocals: Prateeksha Srivastava
Shehnai Player: Yogesh More
Mixed & Mastered by: Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika
A&R: Rajrishi Murthi

Video Credits:
Directed by: Akhilesh Vats
Concept by: Akhilesh Vats, Phalak Arora

For King
Hair: Javed Sheikh
Make-up: Swapnil Haldankar 
King’s Styling: Suprit Parulkar
Styling Assistant: Shrutika Kulkarni, Maanya Saigal

King’s Wardrobe Partner: Manyavar

Wardrobe Courtesy: Dolly J, The World of Anand Sharma
Jewellery Courtesy: Raabta by Rahul, Shilpa, Meraki
 
BTS: Rudransh Sharma & Adeeb Raza

Follow King:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/5NHm4TU5Twz7owibYxJfFU

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/warnermusicindia
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/WarnerMusicInd  
Twitter : https://twitter.com/warnermusicin

Lyrics: 

Verse 1

Ek aisi duniya jaha tu mere saath ho
Hum chaahein bolein na par dil se dil ki baat ho
Aur kabhi tole na dil ko cheezon se jaaneman

Ek aisa rasta kisi ko na pata chale
Jaha se guzrun toh tera naksha mile
Aur thak ke gir padhu aake teri hi kaandhon par

Chorus

Jo ishq hua so hua
Jo ishq hua so hua

Ab na jaanu teri hai dua
Ke na jaanu meri hai dua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua

Verse 2

Jo na tumhe chaahenge
Kya fir karke jaayenge
Hum jaise banne chale the
Hum shayad bann na paayenge

Tum itni zaroori ho
Saanson mein basi poori ho
Meri laage na nazariya tujhe
Inn aankho ki majburi ho

Chorus

Jo ishq hua so hua
Haan ishq hua so hua

Ab na jaanu teri hai dua
Ke na jaanu meri hai dua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua

Verse 3

Ek jhalak mein hi tera deewana hua
Ye duniya paagal bulaati hai

Ab sau nazar kya hi dekhun tumhe jaan-e-jaan
Aashiq ko ek bhi kaafi hai

Tum itni toh noori ho
Na samjho kahi pe adhuri ho
Khud se pyaar kiya karo
Kisi ke liye zaruri ho

Chorus

Jo ishq hua so hua
Haan ishq hua so hua

Ab na jaanu teri hai dua
Ke na jaanu meri hai dua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua
Ab jo ishq hua so hua

Ab jo ishq hua
Ab jo ishq hua

snippet.title: Pardesi Pardesi Jana Nahi 8K | Raja Hindustani |Aamir Khan, Karishma Kapoor,Udit Narayan,Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Pardesi Pardesi Jana Nahi – 8K | Raja Hindustani

Enjoy the classic romantic song Pardesi Pardesi Jana Nahi from the movie Raja Hindustani.
Starring Aamir Khan and Karishma Kapoor, this song beautifully shows love and separation.
Sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this 90s hit is loved even today.
Watch and relive the magic in 8K quality.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Credits:
Singers: Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik, Sapna Awasthi
Lyrics: Sameer
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films, Karim Morani, Bunty Soorma, Ali Morani
Director: Dharmesh Darshan
StarCast: Aamir Khan, Karisma Kapoor, Suresh Oberoi, Archana Puran Singh, Johnny Lever

Song lyrics :

Main Yeh Nahin Kehti Ke Pyaar Mat Karna
Kisi Musafir Ka Magar Aitbaar Mat Karna
Pardesi Pardesi Jaana Nahi
Pardesi Pardesi Jaana Nahi
Mujhe Chhod Ke Mujhe Chhod Ke
Pardesi Pardesi Jaana Nahi
Mujhe Chhod Ke Mujhe Chhod Ke
Pardesi Mere Yaara Vaada Nibhana
Mujhe Yaad Rakhna Kahin Bhool Na Jana

Pardesi Pardesi Jaana Nahi
Pardesi Pardesi Jaana Nahi
Mujhe Chhod Ke Mujhe Chhod Ke
Pardesi Mere Yaara Vaada Nibhana
Tum Yaad Rakhna Kahin Bhool Na Jana
Pardesi Pardesi Jaana Nahi
Mujhe Chhod Ke Mujhe Chhod Ke

Maine Tumko Chaaha Tumse Pyaar Kiya
Sab Kuch Tum Pe Yaar Apna Vaar Diya
Maine Tumko Chaaha Tumse Pyaar Kiya
Sab Kuch Tum Pe Yaar Apna Vaar Diya
Ban Gayi Jogan Maine Preet Ka Jog Liya
Na Socha Na Samjha Dil Ka Rog Liya

Pardesi Mere Yaara Laut Ke Aana
Tum Yaad Rakhna Kahin Bhool Na Jana
Pardesi Pardesi Jaana Nahi
Tu Jaana Nahi
Pardesi Pardesi Jaana Nahi
Re Jaana Nahi
Mujhe Chhod Ke Mujhe Chhod Ke
Mujhe Chhod Ke Mujhe Chhod Ke

Bhool Na Jaana Bhool Na Jaana
Bhool Na Jaana Ooo
Har Pal Meri Yaad Tumhein Tadpayegi
Main Jagunga Neend Tumhein Na Aayegi
Har Pal Meri Yaad Tumhein Tadpayegi
Tadpayegi

Chhod Ke Aise Haal Mein Jo Tum Jaaoge Tum Jaaoge
Sach Kehta Hoon Jaan Bahut Pachhtaoge
Pardesi Mere Yaara Mujhe Na Rulaana

snippet.description:
🎶 Dive into the enchanting world of 90s romance with Asha Bhosle and Kumar Sanu's timeless melody, "Tumhari Nazron Mein Humne Dekha" from the movie Kal Ki Awaz. Relive the golden era of Bollywood music with this heart-touching song that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Let the soulful voices of Asha Bhosle and Kumar Sanu transport you to a realm of pure emotion. 



Credits :

Song: Tumhari Nazron Mein Humne Dekha
Album: Kal Ki Awaz
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 


If this song touched your heart, don't forget to like, share, and comment with your favorite 90s romantic song! Subscribe for more timeless melodies and classic Bollywood gems. Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: Moonwalk - Yethu Video Song | AR Rahman | Prabhudeva | Manoj NS | Yogi Babu | Aju Varghese | Satz
snippet.description:
Lahari Music & Behindwoods Productions Present "Yethu" Official Video Song from the movie Moonwalk. Starring the King of Dance Prabhudeva and featuring music composed and sung by the Maestro A R Rahman.

#Yethu #YethuAudioSong #Moonwalk #ARRahman #Prabhudeva #VivekLyrics #ManojNirmalaSreedharan #ARRahmanVoice #MoonwalkAudio #TamilAudioSongs #ARRMusical #HighBeats #LahariMusic #Moonwalk2026 #2026NewTamilSongs #PrabhudevaMovies #FastBeats #CelebrationSongs

Additional Rhythm Programming: Kumaran Sivamani & Kalyan

Vocal Supervision: Suryansh & Sarath Santosh

Saxophone: Raghav Sachar & Ashish Venkateswaran
Guitar: Keba Jeremiah & Renin
Ukulele: Keba Jeremiah
Bass: Nilanjana

Mixed By Suresh Permal
Mastered By Riyasdeen Riyan

Panchathan Record Inn, Chennai:
Senior Engineers: Suresh Permal & Karthik Sekaran 
Assisting Engineers: Sathish V Saravanan & Bharath Arjunan
Cafe Musica, Redhills:
Recording Engineer: Vibin Sundar
Head of Technical Services: Riyasdeen Riyan
Musician Coordinators: R. Samidurai & Abdul Haiyum
-------------------------------
Yethu Lyrics:

ஏத்து… அப்பறம்… ஆமா 
Aiya .. Aiya .. Aiya .. 

Chorus..,

ரா பத்திக்கிது
தீய ஏத்து
கால் வச்சு speed-அ ஏத்து 
காத்தெல்லாம் dream ah  ஏத்து 

வாழலாம் ஹே வா ராசா கொண்டாடு
வந்தவனெல்லாம் நம்மாளு 
ஏ ஊரோட நீ ஆடு 
அந்த உலக காலில் விளையாடு
இந்த புழுதி வாழ்க்க பூக்காடு 
ஒரு புயலுப் பாட்டு நெஞ்சோடு 

அப்பறம்…அப்பறம்… ஏத்து…ஏத்து…
Aiya.. Aiya.. 

ஆமா… ஏத்து… ஏத்து…

கால வச்சமா  
life அ மேல வச்சமா
வலிய போக வச்சமா
இனி வாழ்க்க நல்லா படபடக்கும்

பாட்ட வச்சமா
நட்ப கூப்டு வச்சமா 
ஒரு கூத்த வச்சமா
இனி நம்ம கேட்டது கெடச்சிருக்கும்

ஏத்து…ஏத்து…ஏத்து…ஏத்து…

ஏத்து… ஏத்து…

ஆமா  ஏத்து…
---------------------------
Enjoy & stay connected with us!!

Re Balam Layo Mero Layo Mero Fortuner Ji

Ho Balam Layo Tero Layo Tero Fortuner Ji

                              
Yaa Meri Choti Halegi - Meri Choti Halegi
Ho Jaipur Te Ajmer Ya Gaadi Nuye Chalegi -2

Mhu Mitha Karlo Syano Ji Lyau Ke Thoda Pista
Re Me Bi Matku Tu Bi Matke Matke Gail Farista-2
Ho Dj Upar Nache Saare Banke Bandar Ji
Ho Balam Layo Tero Layo Tero Fortuner Ji

Mithe Tere Bol Pari 
Na Patya Tole Pari 
Jaan Mhari Kadhe se 
Teri Ramjhol Pari 

Tu Hoke Tyar Jab aai 
Tane Aake Aag Lgai 
Re Tanne Thadi Kari Tabhai
Bnya Mahol Pari 

Mithe Tere Bol Pari 
Na Patya Tole Pari 
jaan Mhari Kadhe Se 
Teri Ramjhol Pari 

1.
Sakal Teri Ya Bholi se re Tyor Tera tedha 
Dil Tanne marya baran marya albheda 
Tu Kisne Konya taki 
Teri kamar ya ban to chaki 
Koi Kasar na rah ri baki 
Thodi daat le jhool pari 

Mithe Tere Bol Pari 
Na Patya tole pari
Jaan mhari kadhe se 
Teri Ramjhol Pari 

2.
Hawaa tanne fiki kardi kardi tanne ora Ki 
Are nigaah Tere pe gad ri se gaad ri se chhorya Ki 
Mukesh Jaji Khogya 
Yo Beej Bighan Ke bogya 
Minna bhi Bola Hogya 
Na kre Makhol Pari 

Mithe Tere Bol Pari 
Na Patya Tole pari 
Jaan mhari Kadhe se 
Teri Ramjhol Pari

snippet.description:

Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

snippet.description:
భీష్మ ఏకాదశి స్పెషల్ విష్ణు సహస్రనామం | Vishnu Sahasranamam With Lyrics | Bhisma Ekadashi 2026

ఓం నమో నారాయణాయ! 

In this video, we present Vishnu Sahasranamam With Telugu Lyrics, making it easy for every devotee to chant along. Listening to the 1000 Names of Lord Vishnu on this auspicious Ekadashi is considered highly meritorious (Punya), helping one overcome financial struggles, health issues, and mental stress. This Success Mantra acts as a spiritual shield for your family. Celebrate this Bhishma Ekadashi Special by immersing yourself in these divine vibrations. May Lord Maha Vishnu bless you with peace and prosperity. 
Govinda Govinda!

snippet.title: DO NOT GO NEAR THE LAVA FROG 🐸 | Hytale - Part 2
snippet.description:
I go deep in the caves today and we find all these weird creatures, And this terrifying frog that can throw you with it’s tongue. Be careful, he can throw you in LAVA too. These lava frogs are dangerous. The nee Minecraft feels amazing. So excited to explore more.

श्रीमन नारायण हरी हरी
ॐ नमो भगवते वासुदेवाय
नाम है तेरा तारन हारा
विष्णु अमृतवाणी
विष्णु चालीसा 
कथा गुरुवार की
विष्णु चौपाई कथा
ॐ जय बृहस्पति देवा
हरि आ जाओ एक बार
ॐ जय जगदीश हरे - आरती 

2392-JDVT-AKB 

आज ही हमारे चैनल " #Aaj_Ke_Bhajan " को SUBSCRIBE करे व अन्य भक्तों के साथ वीडियो को Share करे व Like करना न भूलें |  

Click to Subscribe :- https://bit.ly/3qiR1fg

Guruwar Vrat Katha, Om Namo Bhagavate Vasudevaya, कथा गुरुवार की, श्री बृहस्पतिवार की आरती, बृहस्पतिवार भक्ति भजन, कथा बृहस्पतिवार की, Vishnu Bhajan Sangrah, ॐ जय बृहस्पति देवा, बृहस्पति देव की आरती, Om Jai Brihaspati Deva, ॐ नमो भगवते वासुदेवाय, कथा बृहस्पतिवार की, श्रीमन नारायण, विष्णु भगवान के मधुर भजन, विष्णु भजन, Aaj Ke Bhajan, Vishnu Hindi Bhajan, nonstop vishnu bhajan, bhagwaan vishnu bhajan, vishnu ji ke bhajan, vishnu bhajan, brihaspativar bhajan, brihaspativar special bhajan, aaj ke new bhajan, vishnu bhagvan ke bhajan, nonstop vishnu bhajan, vishnu bhagwaan ke madhur bhajan, Hari bhajan, vishnu ji ke bhajan, aaj ke bhajan, vishnu bhakti bhajan, vishnu bhagwan ke bhajan, vishnu bhagwan ke bhakti bhajan, vishnu bhagwan ke superhit bhajan, vishnu bhagwan bhajan in hindi, vishnu sahasranamam, vishnu sahasranama stotram, श्री बृहस्पतिवार की आरती, ॐ जय बृहस्पति देवा, Best Morning Aarti, बृहस्पति भगवान की व्रत कथा, guru brihaspati ki kahani, yadi Nath Ka Naam Daya Nidhi Hai, Racha Hai Shristi Ko Jis Prabhu Ne

snippet.title: AASTE AASTE OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO | SELEXSTAR & HELIUM | NEW SAMBALPURI RAP SONG | SOURAV & SHRADDHA
snippet.description:
“Aaste Aaste” is a vibrant wedding-style song infused with high energy and celebratory rhythms. Designed to complement wedding festivities and joyful occasions, the music combines traditional wedding vibes with a modern, upbeat sound.

The music video presents an entertaining storyline centered around three thieves who execute a carefully planned fake marriage in order to loot an unsuspecting man. What unfolds is a blend of music, drama, and engaging performances that keep the narrative lively and entertaining throughout.

Watch the full video to experience the music and discover how the story unfolds.
Do share your thoughts in the comments after watching.

snippet.title: DON'T OPEN Your EYES in SLEEP PARALYSIS
snippet.description:
Wassup Gamers,

Today I will be playing a psychological horror game where a creepy horrific entity wants me to open my eyes and I MUST NOT OPEN THEM. (Don't) Open Your Eyes.
(Don't) Open Your Eyes is a horror game where you're sleeping and some possible monster whispers into your ear and really wants you to open your eyes. It's in your best interest to open your eyes.

Thumbnail Credit : @LaurenZside  
I DO NOT OWN THIS THUMBNAIL

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

જેમ અષાઢીના મેઘના મોરલિયા ને ઉમાવા 
એના કરતા જાજી મારા હૈયે તારી માયા
ભરોશો ઉઠયો  કે પછી મનમાં વેમ આયા 
મગ જેવડી વાત માં  તારા દલડાં કાં દુભાયા...

બોલો માંણેક મેળું આંખો માંથી કાજલ કાં ધોવાણાં...(2) 
નૂર ભર્યાં ઝરણાં એક પલ કા હુંકાણા 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...

હો. મન વાલા માવા લીધું કેમ એ વાલવી હરાણાં 
કોઈની વાતો માયાવીને ભીતર કા ભરમાણાં... 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...

હો. તારી હજાર ભુલો હગરી ભર્યા છે કાળજા 
મારી એક ભૂલ વાલીના પ્રીત્યું ના પાંરખા...
 
હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...(2)

હો. મારા રંગભર્યાં રજવાડે બધી રંગત તારાથી
તારું  કાળજું કચવાય  શેને જોયું જાય મારાથી 
હો. રાયના દાણા સરખી વાત પહાડ જેવી પારખી 
પડતી મેલો પંચાયત ભરોહા લેશે ભરખી...

હો. અમુક વાતો એવી વાંચા માં ક્યાં હમાય
થોડું આંખોમાં ઉભરાય થોડું આતમ બોલી જાય 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...(2)

હો. તારો મારો રાગ જોઈ આ રાજી નથી લોકો
કલેશ કરી આપોના હસવાનો એમને મોકો..

હો. માન્યું થોડું માઠું લાગ્યું વાત હવે છોડો 
મોઢે લાવો સ્મિત ઓ હેતાળું હવે બોલો 

હો. માથે રામ રાખી કહી દઉં દલડાં દુભાવા નહીં દઉં 
આ જીવ રહેશે ત્યાં સુધી રડવાં હું નહીં દઉં 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...(2)

📝 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐡 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬 :)

Jem Ashadhina Meghna Moraliya Ne Umava
Ena Karta Jaji Mara Haiye Tari Maya
Bharoso Uthyo Ke Pachhi Manma Vem Aaya
Mag Jevdi Vaat Ma Tara Daldan Kaa Dubhaya...

Bolo Manek Melu Aankho Mathi Kajal Kaa Dhovana...(2)
Noor Bharya Jharna Ek Pal Kaa Hunkana

જેમ અષાઢીના મેઘના મોરલિયા ને ઉમાવા 
એના કરતા જાજી મારા હૈયે તારી માયા
ભરોશો ઉઠયો  કે પછી મનમાં વેમ આયા 
મગ જેવડી વાત માં  તારા દલડાં કાં દુભાયા...

બોલો માંણેક મેળું આંખો માંથી કાજલ કાં ધોવાણાં...(2) 
નૂર ભર્યાં ઝરણાં એક પલ કા હુંકાણા 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...

હો. મન વાલા માવા લીધું કેમ એ વાલવી હરાણાં 
કોઈની વાતો માયાવીને ભીતર કા ભરમાણાં... 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...

હો. તારી હજાર ભુલો હગરી ભર્યા છે કાળજા 
મારી એક ભૂલ વાલીના પ્રીત્યું ના પાંરખા...
 
હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...(2)

હો. મારા રંગભર્યાં રજવાડે બધી રંગત તારાથી
તારું  કાળજું કચવાય  શેને જોયું જાય મારાથી 
હો. રાયના દાણા સરખી વાત પહાડ જેવી પારખી 
પડતી મેલો પંચાયત ભરોહા લેશે ભરખી...

હો. અમુક વાતો એવી વાંચા માં ક્યાં હમાય
થોડું આંખોમાં ઉભરાય થોડું આતમ બોલી જાય 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...(2)

હો. તારો મારો રાગ જોઈ આ રાજી નથી લોકો
કલેશ કરી આપોના હસવાનો એમને મોકો..

હો. માન્યું થોડું માઠું લાગ્યું વાત હવે છોડો 
મોઢે લાવો સ્મિત ઓ હેતાળું હવે બોલો 

હો. માથે રામ રાખી કહી દઉં દલડાં દુભાવા નહીં દઉં 
આ જીવ રહેશે ત્યાં સુધી રડવાં હું નહીં દઉં 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...(2)

Kalesh Kari Aapona Hasvana Emne Moko...
Ho, Manyu Thodu Mathu Lagyu Vaat Have Chhodo

Ho, Mathe Ram Rakhi Kahi Dau Daldan Dubhava Nahi Dau
Aa Jiv Raheshe Tya Sudhi Radva Hu Nahi Dau

હો. રાયના દાણા સરખી વાત પહાડ જેવી પારખી 
પડતી મેલો પંચાયત ભરોહા લેશે ભરખી...

હો. અમુક વાતો એવી વાંચા માં ક્યાં હમાય
થોડું આંખોમાં ઉભરાય થોડું આતમ બોલી જાય 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...(2)

હો. તારો મારો રાગ જોઈ આ રાજી નથી લોકો
કલેશ કરી આપોના હસવાનો એમને મોકો..

હો. માન્યું થોડું માઠું લાગ્યું વાત હવે છોડો 
મોઢે લાવો સ્મિત ઓ હેતાળું હવે બોલો 

હો. માથે રામ રાખી કહી દઉં દલડાં દુભાવા નહીં દઉં 
આ જીવ રહેશે ત્યાં સુધી રડવાં હું નહીં દઉં 

હા. રતન રાણી રીહાણા મારા લાડ લજવાણા...(2)

Ena Karta Jaji Mara Haiye Tari Maya
Bharoso Uthyo Ke Pachhi Manma Vem Aaya

Jaya Ekadashi Vrat Katha is dedicated to Lord Vishnu on the Ekadashi of the Shukla Paksha of the month of Magh, which brings liberation and salvation from the vampire womb. According to the story, in the assembly of Indra, a Gandharva named Malyavan and a Gandharva girl named Pushyavati were born in the vampire womb because of the curse. While in the Himalayas, he inadvertently observed the fast of Jaya Ekadashi, which removed the vampirism and he returned to heaven.

snippet.title: Ratnamala - Video Song | Parasakthi | Sivakarthikeyan | Sreeleela | Sudha Kongara | G.V. Prakash
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Tamil

Presenting the video song of "Ratnamala" from 'Parasakthi' starring Sivakarthikeyan, Ravi Mohan, Atharvaa, Sreeleela and others. Directed by Sudha Kongara. Music Composed by G.V. Prakash Kumar.

Song Credits:
Name:  Ratnamala
Music by G. V. Prakash Kumar
Singer : G. V. Prakash Kumar
Lyrics: Jayashree Mathimaran
Telugu Lyrics: Saraswathi Puthra Ramajogayya Sastry
Programmed by Raj Kumar Amal
Male chorus : Abhijith Rao, Shibi Srinivasan, Jagadeesh Kumar Balraj, Govind prasad
Female Chorus : Anusha, Gayathri, Sriradha Bharath, Devu Treesa Mathew, Indulekha Sanathkumar
Music Supervised by Jehovahson Alghar
Recorded, Mixed and Mastered by Jehovahson Alghar, Divine labs 
Assistant Sound Engineer : Roopash Tiwari, Divine labs 
Divine labs Musicians Assistant : P Rajamurugan

Movie Credits:
Produced by: Aakash Baskaran
Star Cast: Ravi Mohan, Sivakarthikeyan, Atharvaa, Sreeleela
Written & Directed by: Sudha Kongara
A G.V. Prakash Musical
Director of Photography: Ravi K. Chandran, ISC
Written by: Sudha Kongara, Arjun Nadesan
Expert Consultant: Professor Dr. A. Ramasamy
Production Design: M.R. Karthik Rajkumar
Action: Supreme Sundar
Editor: Sathish Suriya
Second Unit Director & Post Production head: Milind Rau
Art Director: S. Annadurai
Lyrics: Yugabharathi, Ekadesi, Arivu, Kaber Vasuki, Jayashree Mathimaran
Additional Screenplay: Ganeshaa
Additional Dialogues: Madhan Karky, Shan Karuppusamy
Costume Design: Poornima
Costumer: D. Arun Mohan
Choreography: Brinda, Kruti Mahesh, Anusha Viswanathan
Sound Design: Suren. G – S. Alagiakoothan
Visual Promotions: Deepak Bhojraj, E. Sangathamizhan
VFX Supervisor: K.V. Sanjit
Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Hair & Make-Up: Serina, S. Shyed Malik
Stills: CH. Balu
PRO: Suresh Chandra, Satish (AIM)
Publicity Design: Gopi Prasannaa
Production Executive: T. Hariharasudhan
Marketing Head: Manoj Maddy
Post Coordinator: Gunashekar M
Creative Producer: Dev Ramnath
Executive Producers: M.P. Senthel, Rhea Kongara

Lyrics: 
Pallavi 
Ratnamalaa !! Ratnamala !!  
Nannu veedi nuvvala poraadhey.  
Ratnamalaa !! Ratnamala !!  
Minnu veedi vennela poraadhey  
Ulagame suzhalvadhean? 
Udhiriyaai udaivadhean? 
yetho noolondril varaindha 
Kurippu poley tholaindheney… 
Ratna Malaa, Ratna Malaa 
Ennai vittu needhaan neengaadhey 
Ratna Malaa, Ratna Malaa 
Kannai vittu imaigal neengaadhey… 

Chorus 
Vaalai Kumari penne 
Vandhaan Kumaran ponne 
Solai pookkalin munne 
Olai vidu thoodhu kanne 

Chorus 
Nenjam adhu enna kallo 
Manjam ini aagum mullo 
Vanjam seyvaalo paavai 
Thanjam adhu undhan paadhai (paavai) 

Charanam 1 
Oh.. Oh.. Adiye neeyum nalamaa? 
Kadidham solli vidumaa? 
Meiyodu mutham kalandhuvaithathai 
En aasai solla vaarthai theerndhadhai… 
Un pirivil nagal nogudhey 
En paruvam madal yerudhey 
Pen uruvam nizhalaanadhe 
Mei sera, maane…! 

Chorus 
Vaalai Kumari penne 
Vandhaan Kumaran ponne 
Solai pookkalin munne 
Olai vidu thoodhu kanne 

Chorus 
Nenjam adhu enna kallo 
Manjam ini aagum mullo 
Vanjam seyvaalo paavai 
Thanjam adhu undhan paadhai (paavai) 

Pallavi Repeat 
Ratna Malaa, Ratna Malaa 
Kannai vittu imaigal neengaadhey… 

Charanam 2 
Oh.. Oh.. Azhage… idhazh oram, melidhaai 
Muruval koodum 
Karum mega kootil minnal keetru pol… 
Araipulli yodu neelum paattai pol… 
Viral idukkin peana munai 
Idam maatru neeyum adhai… 
Un meani theendidum vaira 
Madalthaalum naane… 

Pallavi Final 
Ulagame suzhalvadhean? 
Udhiriyaai udaivadhean? 
yetho noolondril varaindha 
Kurippu poley tholaindheney… 
Ratna Malaa, Ratna Malaa 
Ennai vittu needhaan neengaadhey 
Ratna Malaa, Ratna Malaa 
Kannai vittu imaigal neengaadhey… 


Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

To buy virus free original tracks, visit  https://www.saregama.com/musicstore

snippet.title: Punk Was NOT the Problem.? | NONx Absolute Domination!!🔥
snippet.description:
Thinking of doing B.Tech CSE, but confused between traditional engineering colleges vs
new-age tech schools?
This video is a complete, honest, and detailed breakdown of Alta School of Technology
(ASOT) its curriculum, learning model, eligibility, entrance exam, and why it’s being seen as a
future-ready alternative to conventional engineering education.
🔍 What You’ll Learn in This Video:
✅ What is Alta School of Technology
✅ Why Alta follows an AI-First, Experiential Learning model
✅ How coding starts from Day 1 at Alta
✅ Year-wise CSE Program curriculum structure
✅ Difference between Alta vs traditional engineering colleges
✅ Industry exposure, projects & internship focus
✅ Who should choose Alta School of Technology
✅ Eligibility criteria & entrance exam details
✅ Is Alta School of Technology worth it in 2026?
What is Alta School of Technology?
Alta School of Technology is a new-age school of Technology designed to prepare students for
real tech careers, not just exams.
It offers an AI-first, industry-driven B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering (CSE)
through UGC & AICTE-approved partner universities.
Alta focuses on:
● Coding from Day One
● Real-world projects & product building
● Industry-aligned curriculum instead of outdated theory
Entrance Exam & Important Dates (ASAT)
● Exam Name: ASAT (Alta Scholastic Aptitude Test)
● Mode: Online
● Eligibility: Class 12th (PCM), minimum 50% aggregate
● ASAT 2026: Conducted in multiple slots
● Registration will start from 24th January 2026
Early applicants usually get better scholarship opportunities.

snippet.title: Veera Karjo Re Vichar (Official Video) | Savan Bharwad | Manisha Bharwad | New Gujarati Song 2026
snippet.description:
“વીરા કરજો રે વિચાર” 🎶💃 નવો ઝનઝનાટભર્યો ગુજરાતી ડાન્સ સોંગ, જે તમારા દિલને નચાવી દેશે!

Credits:
Singer: Savan Bharwad, Manisha Bharwad
Producer: Red Velvet Cinema
Lyrics: Ramesh Vachiya
Music: Jackie Gajjar
Artist: Kuldeep Mishra, Yasvi Patel, Shivani Rajput, Meet Rao
Co-Artist: Bharat Chaudhari, Viresh Nayak
Concept Director: Vishnu Thakor (Adalaj)
Camera: Chirag Kachariya
Executive Producer: Dhyey Films & Team
Editing: Ravindra S. Rathod
Technical Support: Jenish Talaviya
Production: Ramesh Bhai, Halol
Makeup & Hair: Dhara Shah
Light: Imran Bhai, Vadodara
Crowd Group: Gopi, Vadodara
Sound: Sunil Kachhiya
Special Thanks: Indar Gamara

Lyrics:
હે આમના નાના છે રે ફળીયા, માથા અડતા ફૂટશે નળીયા
આપણે મોટા ના મોટિયાર, વિરા કરજો ને વિચાર
નથી લૂગડાં ના ઠેકાણા, એના જોડે માર્યા થીગડાં
લાગો સોં નાહ્યા વગર આયા, તમે છકડો લઇ ને આયા
મુલવ્યું હોય મોંઘુ તો ખબર પડે લેવાય કેમ ના
નથી માર્યા કંઇ થીગડ એનાં કાવડિયા દીધા બમણા 
એ થોડા ધીમા રયો ફેંકવામાં, નઈ પોકવા દઉં બોલવામાં
આટલા ફેશન વાળા છો તો કેમ આયા સોં છકડા માં
લાખો ની ગાડી ને આ સમજે સે છકડો
હજી સમય છે વિરા શેર નો મારગ પકડો
મેમાન આયા આંગણે થઇ દીધા તમને માન છે
જાવું હોય તમારે શેર તો ખુલ્લી આ બજાર સે.
સવાર ના આયા તોય તમે પાણી નું નથી પૂછતાં
ભૂખ અમે ભાગ્યા પેટ માં બિલાડા બોલતા
વેવાઈ થોડી થોડી જમજે મસૂરિયા ની દાળ 
તારા પેટડિયા માં દુખશે મસૂરિયા ની દાળ 
હે તારા પેટડિયા મા બોલડિયા માં એતર બોલે તેતર બોલે સેમ ની શીયાળ બોલે ગામ ના ગધાડા બોલે બોલે હોલો ગૂતર ગુઉ કે હોલો બોલે ઘૂ ઘૂ મસૂરિયા ની દાળ 
હે પેટમાં હુતું તુ હુતું તુ બોલ સે મસૂરિયા ની દાળ 
હે વેવાઈ તારા માંડવે લાલા ડંકો વાગ્યો 
હે તારા ગાદલા ફટકા ને પોણી મોડા વેવાઈ તે તો જલસો બનયો 
વેવાઈ તારા ચૂલા મા લાલ ડંકો વાગ્યો 
હે તારા ભાત ખાટા ને દાળ મોડી વેવાઈ તે તો જલસો બનયો 
વેવાઈ તારા માંડવે લાલ ડંકો વાગ્યો 
વેવાઈ તારા ચૂલા મા લાલ ડંકો વાગ્યો
તમે બે હાથે ખાધું, સાવ કરો છો ખોટી વાતું
આવડતી હોય તો કરતા જાવ સારી બે વાતું
સુ કરીયે મીઠી વાતું, હવે થવા આયી રાત્યું
અમારી લોબી છે વાટ્યું, પછી કરશુ મીઠી વાતું

localized.title: Veera Karjo Re Vichar (Official Video) | Savan Bharwad | Manisha Bharwad | New Gujarati Song 2026
localized.description:
“વીરા કરજો રે વિચાર” 🎶💃 નવો ઝનઝનાટભર્યો ગુજરાતી ડાન્સ સોંગ, જે તમારા દિલને નચાવી દેશે!

Credits:
Singer: Savan Bharwad, Manisha Bharwad
Producer: Red Velvet Cinema
Lyrics: Ramesh Vachiya
Music: Jackie Gajjar
Artist: Kuldeep Mishra, Yasvi Patel, Shivani Rajput, Meet Rao
Co-Artist: Bharat Chaudhari, Viresh Nayak
Concept Director: Vishnu Thakor (Adalaj)
Camera: Chirag Kachariya
Executive Producer: Dhyey Films & Team
Editing: Ravindra S. Rathod
Technical Support: Jenish Talaviya
Production: Ramesh Bhai, Halol
Makeup & Hair: Dhara Shah
Light: Imran Bhai, Vadodara
Crowd Group: Gopi, Vadodara
Sound: Sunil Kachhiya
Special Thanks: Indar Gamara

Lyrics:
હે આમના નાના છે રે ફળીયા, માથા અડતા ફૂટશે નળીયા
આપણે મોટા ના મોટિયાર, વિરા કરજો ને વિચાર
નથી લૂગડાં ના ઠેકાણા, એના જોડે માર્યા થીગડાં
લાગો સોં નાહ્યા વગર આયા, તમે છકડો લઇ ને આયા
મુલવ્યું હોય મોંઘુ તો ખબર પડે લેવાય કેમ ના
નથી માર્યા કંઇ થીગડ એનાં કાવડિયા દીધા બમણા 
એ થોડા ધીમા રયો ફેંકવામાં, નઈ પોકવા દઉં બોલવામાં
આટલા ફેશન વાળા છો તો કેમ આયા સોં છકડા માં
લાખો ની ગાડી ને આ સમજે સે છકડો
હજી સમય છે વિરા શેર નો મારગ પકડો
મેમાન આયા આંગણે થઇ દીધા તમને માન છે
જાવું હોય તમારે શેર તો ખુલ્લી આ બજાર સે.
સવાર ના આયા તોય તમે પાણી નું નથી પૂછતાં
ભૂખ અમે ભાગ્યા પેટ માં બિલાડા બોલતા
વેવાઈ થોડી થોડી જમજે મસૂરિયા ની દાળ 
તારા પેટડિયા માં દુખશે મસૂરિયા ની દાળ 
હે તારા પેટડિયા મા બોલડિયા માં એતર બોલે તેતર બોલે સેમ ની શીયાળ બોલે ગામ ના ગધાડા બોલે બોલે હોલો ગૂતર ગુઉ કે હોલો બોલે ઘૂ ઘૂ મસૂરિયા ની દાળ 
હે પેટમાં હુતું તુ હુતું તુ બોલ સે મસૂરિયા ની દાળ 
હે વેવાઈ તારા માંડવે લાલા ડંકો વાગ્યો 
હે તારા ગાદલા ફટકા ને પોણી મોડા વેવાઈ તે તો જલસો બનયો 
વેવાઈ તારા ચૂલા મા લાલ ડંકો વાગ્યો 
હે તારા ભાત ખાટા ને દાળ મોડી વેવાઈ તે તો જલસો બનયો 
વેવાઈ તારા માંડવે લાલ ડંકો વાગ્યો 
વેવાઈ તારા ચૂલા મા લાલ ડંકો વાગ્યો
તમે બે હાથે ખાધું, સાવ કરો છો ખોટી વાતું
આવડતી હોય તો કરતા જાવ સારી બે વાતું
સુ કરીયે મીઠી વાતું, હવે થવા આયી રાત્યું
અમારી લોબી છે વાટ્યું, પછી કરશુ મીઠી વાતું

#savanbharwad 
#manishabharwad 
#saregamagujarati 
#newgujaratisong 
#gujarati 
#gujaratistatus

snippet.description:
Mor Maa Samalei Production Presents The Wonderful New Official  Sambalpuri Music Video Of The Song ''Hae Go ''. This song is produced by Ramprashad Chhuria , Sung By Mantu Chhuria & Aseema Panda, beautifully penned by Pintu Chhuria & the music of this song is created and composed by Rehan Kamal & Mantu Chhuria.    

Audio Credits :-  

Song - Hae Go Singer - Mantu Chhuria & Aseema Panda 
Music & Composed By - Rehan Kamal & Mantu Chhuria 
Lyrics - Pintu Chhuria 
Drums - Anirudh Dhal (Babu Dada) 
VST Programming - Jaga JD 
Backing Vocals - Petu Dhulia & Viral Boy  
Chorus - Dileswar,Rehan,Ganesh,Radhe,Balram,Roshan 
Rhythm - Pramod da, Manish Da,Radhe Da,Balram,Kalia,Pruthvi,Kana,Roshan,Petu Dhulia 
Violin - Jyoti 
Recorded At MRR Studio Cuttack 
Recordist - Harishankar Mohapatra 
Voice Dubbed By Nilakantha Naik 
Mixed & Mastered By Shaktiswar Mahapatra  

Video Credits :- 

Produced By Ramprashad Chhuria  
Starring - Mantu Chhuria 
Featuring - Dreamgirl Dory 
DOP - Bishwajit Samal & Tubul Singh 
Asst. - Jayanta Banka , Subham Sahu , Nitesh Bhoi & Subodh 
Edit - Bishwajit Samal 
DI & Colorist  - Mahesh Patra(Digital Dreams)

Concept - Dileswar Bibhar 
Choreographed By S.Sudarshan Bivar 
Directed By B.NJ Niroj

Art Director - Prashanta Bag (Babu) 
Tent - Raja Tent House  
Food - Rasanand Catering  
Makeup - Piya Das  
Poster & Publicity Designed By Deepak Bhoi (DZ Films) 
Costume Designer(Mantu Chhuria) - Ajay Meher  
Costume Designer(Dory) - Peter Walter 
Costume - Maa Chitralaya , Radhakrushna Chitralaya ,Dressmeup
Lights & Equipment - Sudam Parida (TSCE Cuttack), Chandi Cine Equipment, J5 Lights  
Creative Head - Sangram Mahapatra  
Camera & Equipment - Digital Dreams , Samaleswari Cine Equipment , Biswajit Films , NB Films & MYTH Films 
Location Owner - Tanish Poddar  
Dance Groups - Sambalpur Dance Group , Hirakud Dance Group , Dance Floor , Face To Face , UW Dance Group , Aryan Dance Group , Kalahandi Group , Brajrajnagar Group , Pooja Dance Group RKL,Aju Dance Group Binka 
Best Supporting  - Sidhu Saha , Chinta Bag & Rajiv Gond  
Special Thanks - Pradeep Bapi , Ganesh Luha , Manisha Bag ,Sony Gond ,Aryan , Laxman , Deepak , Ajit , Badapratap , James Lal , Sumit , Chhotu , Jiten Dada , Tapan , Chandan Das , Nanu , Sachin , Biswajit , Sukta Bhai , Jaga  


Lyrics:-

M-Haego...Haego... 
    Suna.. Haego..

Haego Haego tike suna
Haego Haego tike suna
Haego Haego tike suna
Haego Haego tike suna

Haego Haego Suna Tamku dekhi kari 
Haye Haye re sundiri , A Mor Sundiri
Hae go suna tumar thhane.....
RAHICHHE MOR MANA..

Antara:-
M-Gudunu Mudke go tumen sundiri ........ tumen sundiri
    Gudunu Mudke go.....Mudke go......Mudke go
    Gudunu Mudke go tumen sundiri
    Tumar kaen bali gaemi guna 
    Tume pare go tume pare 
    Tume pare mor udiyan Janhan..

F-Thau Go Thau Go babu A babu Thau 
    Ete Katha Mate Nai Kahana 
    Laaje Laaje Laaje Thari Jauchhe
    Lubh Lubhani Mor Juba Jaubana

M-Tumar Gaal ke Dekhi Kari  
    Chal ke dekhi Kari
    Haego Suna Tumar Thhane
    RAHICHHE MOR MANA


F-Eta Kaen Chalana Mor Dhana Go 
    Eta Kaen Chalana...
    Katha Pade Kahemi Baluchhen 
    Kaen je Tame Nai Sunuchha 

M- Kana Kaheba je ta Kahi Diana

F- Haego Haego Tike Suna  
     Haego Haego Tike Suna  
     Haego Haego Tike Suna  
    Haego Haego Tike Suna 

Haego Haego Suna Tamku Dekhi Kari
Haye Haye Mor Sundura
A Mor Sundura
Haego Suna Tumar Thhane
RAHICHHE MOR MANA....

I am Khaleel Present : Roblox Risky Roads Gameplay | Extreme Driving Obby Challenge! 

Welcome to Roblox Risky Roads, an extreme driving obby where only the best drivers survive! Get ready for chaotic, dangerous, and unpredictable roads that will test your driving skills to the limit.

What to Expect in Risky Roads:
• Drive on dangerous and unstable roads
• Survive falling boulders, lava, geysers, rivers, and earthquakes
• Cross ice bridges, abandoned mines, and ancient temples
• Unlock and drive powerful vehicles 
• Compete, crash, and laugh with friends 
• One wrong move… and it’s over 

Can YOU make it to the end without falling?
This Roblox driving game is packed with intense challenges, funny fails, and epic moments. Whether you’re playing solo or with friends, Risky Roads is pure chaos and fun!

snippet.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
snippet.description:
#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan
1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan

1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
अंबर तारों में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
नर नारी में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
पत्ते पत्ते में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

Mere Tan Mein Bhi Ram Mere Mann Mein Bhi Ram The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.

snippet.title: Sri Vishnu, Goddess Tulasamma & Lord Venkateswara Chalisa Telugu | Bhisma Ekadasi Special Bhakti
snippet.description:
🙏✨ Sri Vishnu, Goddess Tulasamma & Lord Venkateswara Chalisa in Telugu ✨🙏
On the auspicious occasion of Bhisma Ekadasi, listen to this powerful combination of Sri Vishnu Chalisa, Tulasamma Chalisa, and Lord Venkateswara Chalisa in Telugu to receive divine blessings.

Sri Vishnu Chalisa Telugu, Goddess Tulasamma Chalisa Telugu, and Lord Venkateswara Chalisa Telugu fill devotees’ hearts with divine devotion during sacred occasions. On the holy Bhisma Ekadasi Special Telugu, Ekadasi Chalisa Telugu and Vishnu Ekadasi Pooja Songs create a deeply spiritual atmosphere. The soothing melodies of Vishnu Venkateswara Bhakti Songs blend beautifully with Tulasamma Bhakti Songs Telugu, spreading peace and faith. With Bhisma Ekadasi Songs Telugu and other Telugu Devotional Chalisa, devotees offer prayers seeking blessings, purity, and divine grace.

I prefer this response

🌿 Bhisma Ekadasi Significance:
This sacred Ekadasi is highly auspicious for seeking moksha, prosperity, health, and spiritual growth. Chanting Vishnu and Venkateswara Chalisa along with devotion to Goddess Tulasamma is believed to remove sins and bring peace and abundance.

🔔 Ideal for:

Ekadasi Vratham

Morning & Evening Pooja

Meditation & Bhakti Listening

Vishnu & Venkateswara Devotion
